assertions.title: Gas price displays when Spandex provides it

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ (default Base chain, USDC→WETH, amount 1000)
steps.observed: Form loaded with Base (8453), USDC, WETH, amount 1000

steps.expected: Comparison results appear with gas info
steps.observed: Spandex quote returned as recommended. Reason box shows 'Gas Price: 0.0067 gwei'. Result card shows 'Gas Cost: 0.000015 ETH' and 'Gas Price: 0.0067 gwei' with proper labels.

steps.action: Verify API response structure via curl
steps.expected: API response includes gas_price_gwei and spandex.gas_cost_eth
steps.observed: API returned gas_price_gwei: '0.0060', spandex.gas_cost_eth: '0.000007', recommendation: 'spandex'. Gas price in gwei and gas cost in ETH both present.

steps.action: Scroll down to verify gas labels in result card
steps.expected: Gas Cost and Gas Price displayed with proper formatting
steps.observed: Result card shows 'GAS COST: 0.000015 ETH' and 'GAS PRICE: 0.0067 gwei' as separate labeled fields, positioned together below the 'Via Spandex / odos' line.

evidence.consoleErrors: favicon.ico 404 only (known cosmetic, ignored per guidance)

assertions.title: UI displays gas seamlessly regardless of source

steps.action: Compare quotes on Base (8453) — Spandex provides gas_cost_eth, gas_price_gwei from RPC fallback
steps.expected: Gas Price and Gas Cost displayed in result card
steps.observed: Result card shows 'GAS COST: 0.000004 ETH' and 'GAS PRICE: 0.0060 gwei'. Reason box shows 'Gas Price: 0.0060 gwei'.

steps.action: Compare quotes on Ethereum (1) — Spandex returns null, gas_price_gwei exclusively from RPC fallback
steps.expected: Gas Price displayed with same formatting as Base case
steps.observed: Curve recommended result shows 'GAS PRICE: 0.1138 gwei' in the result card. Reason box shows 'Gas Price: 0.1138 gwei'. Same label ('Gas Price'), same format (X.XXXX gwei), same visual styling.

steps.action: Verify source code uses same rendering path regardless of gas data origin
steps.expected: Single gas_price_gwei field passed to UI, no source indicator
steps.observed: Server code at line 580: effectiveGasPriceGwei = spandex.result?.gas_price_gwei ?? gasPriceGwei (prefers Spandex, falls back to RPC). UI code at line 5258-5259 renders 'Gas Price: X gwei' from data.gas_price_gwei. Both renderSpandexQuote() and renderCurveQuote() use identical HTML structure for gas display. No visual indicator of gas data source anywhere in the UI.

steps.action: Compare screenshots of Base (Spandex + RPC fallback) vs Ethereum (RPC fallback only)
steps.expected: Same labels, same formatting, no visual difference in gas display
steps.observed: Both show 'GAS PRICE' label in uppercase, value in 'X.XXXX gwei' format. Base additionally shows 'GAS COST' because Spandex provided gas_cost_eth; Ethereum Curve result shows only 'GAS PRICE' because gas_cost_eth was 0 (Curve can't estimate gas without funded sender — known limitation per user-testing.md). The gas price formatting is identical across both.

evidence.sourceInspection: src/server.ts lines 578-580 (effectiveGasPriceGwei), lines 5118-5127 (renderSpandexQuote gas), lines 5198-5207 (renderCurveQuote gas), lines 5257-5259 (reason box gas)

frictions.description: Chrome profile lock (SingletonLock) prevented browser launch on first attempt — required clearing stale lock files in /Users/bryan/Library/Caches/ms-playwright/mcp-chrome/
frictions.resolution: Killed stale Chrome processes and removed SingletonLock/SingletonSocket/SingletonCookie files

frictions.description: Browser context crash after chain switch caused 'Another browser context is being closed' error, and dev server went down (connection refused). Required restarting dev server.
frictions.resolution: Restarted dev server with PORT=3002 npm run dev, cleared lock files, relaunched browser

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-GAS-001 confirmed gas price in gwei and gas cost in ETH display correctly in comparison results (Base chain, Spandex quote). VAL-GAS-004 confirmed the UI renders gas data identically regardless of whether it originates from Spandex or RPC fallback — same 'Gas Price' label, same gwei formatting, same HTML structure in both renderSpandexQuote() and renderCurveQuote() functions.
